scope_description: Independent review of the cf-access-jwt-auth feature (PBI-032): opt-in Cloudflare Access JWT verification as an alternate auth credential.
head: 0c7690a2f0632a94ce5bf9738e62a6cd32a3a6ed

reviewers.trigger: conditional: external service call added (JWKS fetch to Cloudflare in src/web/cf_access.rs)

findings.title: iss/aud validated-if-present but not required
findings.resolution: validation.set_required_spec_claims(&["exp","iss","aud"]) added; regression tests missing_aud_claim_is_rejected and missing_iss_claim_is_rejected added (verified to fail without the fix, pass with it -- confirmed live by the orchestrator via temporary revert). Independently re-verified: cargo build/test(271+2+3 green)/fmt/clippy all clean.

findings.title: No regression test for JWT algorithm-substitution (alg=none / HS256 confusion)
findings.resolution: Added alg_none_token_is_rejected (hand-built unsigned token) and hs256_key_confusion_is_rejected (HMAC-signed with the RSA public modulus as secret) -- both assert Err. RS256 pinning itself was pre-existing and independently confirmed enforced by the jsonwebtoken crate by rev-security; this closes the missing regression-proof gap. Also bundled a P2 code-quality fix (team_domain trailing-slash normalization) in the same cell since it touched identical lines.

gate4.note: Both P1s fixed in cf-access-jwt-auth-3 (commit a5e2a25), independently re-verified by the orchestrator. P2/P3 filed to backlog, non-blocking. Awaiting the human's explicit Gate 4 merge answer -- not auto-approved, since no UAT walkthrough was run against CONTEXT.md.
